name: chr21_21q22_13_ABCG1_SD
description: 21q22.13 SD cluster around ABCG1/UMODL1; ABCG1 has paralogs ABCG2/ABCG5/ABCG8 elsewhere (4q22, 2p21) and a local intragene SD plus ~30 kb flanking duplicons at 96% identity. Rare CNVs at this locus modulate HDL metabolism and atherosclerosis risk.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct-orientation ~30 kb SD pair flanking ABCG1; intragene SD within ABCG1 introns; cross-chromosome paralogs not co-mappable.
